# 13072 - 병사관리

:::info

- **문제 보기**: [13072 - 병사관리](https://swexpertacademy.com/main/talk/solvingClub/problemView.do?solveclubId=AZwrPjFqFyDHBIT3&contestProbId=AXxODdXKQAADFASZ&probBoxId=AZwrPjFqFyHHBIT3&type=PROBLEM&problemBoxTitle=1%EC%A3%BC%EC%B0%A8&problemBoxCnt=6)
- **소요 시간**: 1시간 37분 (w/ GEMINI)
- **풀이 언어**: `java`
